privileged_info_summary: Discovered that the task is defective. Critical scripts (setup_task.ps1, export_result.ps1) are missing from the environment, which breaks the verifier completely because it attempts to read the non-existent task_result.json output file. The target data entry requirements for wind speed (8), direction (SE/135), temperature (82), and humidity (65) explicitly match the prompt description.
